title: anoectochilus repens
intro: Anoectochilus repens, also known as creeping orchid or Chinese creeping orchid, is a type of plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throat, due to its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Anoectochilus repens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in Asia. Anoectochilus repens is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for convenient consumption.
